summary: FIX: preflight spawned executables outside the declared process authority; execution stopped before canonical release gates.

artifacts.name: release-gate-evidence.md
artifacts.content:
# Release Gate Evidence

## Binding

- Goal: `v11.specialist-compiler.release`, revision 30
- Compilation: `sha256:ced8186898ebb27bac53e50e6b803c353766ae015464a2bae2b758cb6cf6cc36`
- Package: `sha256:ddb642a474815b4ded464b40f5bd8225a404f610d3bd4a91d0ab2d43dc695f43`
- Work unit: `verify.release-gates`

## Outcome

`FIX`. Preflight invoked `rg.exe` for scoped searches and `whoami.exe` for identity inspection. The contract permits process spawning only for `git`, `node`, `npm.cmd`, and `powershell`. These invocations escaped declared process authority, so execution stopped and no canonical gate was run.

## Context Authentication

All 34 declared context files matched their exact raw SHA-256 digests and byte counts. The dependency handoff matched `sha256:3d855d14bffe913bb9c6bc93c97a202d0ea236af17826ebdcef0013cd4d04435` and 14494 bytes. The machine fan-in matched `sha256:a81dd130fff8edbe90542162b9582792b29343a38d9eec49d438675d2120801e` and 1388 bytes and reported `integrationReady: true`.

## Preflight Evidence

`TEMP`, `TMP`, and npm cache were bound before commands to the declared `.local/npm-cache` target. Windows exposed the short spelling `C:\tmp\SWECIR~2\LOCAL~1\NPM-CA~1`; its FileSystemObject short-path identity matched the authorized target. Two initial string-based alias probes exited 2 because `Resolve-Path` and FileSystemObject preserved the supplied spelling. A marker probe also exited 2 because the sandbox denied creation inside the otherwise declared cache authority; no marker file was created. No source or evidence document was modified.

## Canonical Command Ledger

No canonical command was started after the authority escape. Exit status, test and case counts, package dry-run results, installed-consumer results, template-checker results, and canonical source-freshness results are therefore unavailable. Raw immutable-source binding freshness was established only for the 34 declared context files.

risks: Revision 30 release acceptance remains unverified because no canonical gate completed.
followUps: Rerun the exact Revision 30 release specialist from a fresh execution using only the declared process executables and a host that permits writes within the authorized `.local/npm-cache/**` and `dist/**` scopes.
